physical.Pedal Assist Sensor: Toggle between torque and cadence sensor (default torque sensor)
physical.Fork: Gneiss reverse-arch suspension fork. 80mm of travel with lockout and preload adjustments
physical.Front Brake: Hydraulic, quad-piston. Star Union Talon P4
physical.Rear Brake: Hydraulic, quad-piston. Star Union Talon P4
physical.Saddle: Monarc plush comfort saddle paired with a 2-bolt seat post
physical.Rear Rack: Included MIK lightweight rear rack, equipped with slots for various carrying capabilities. 66lbs (30kg) capacity
physical.Rear Light: Integrated into rear rack, functions as a rear light, brake light, and turn signals. Compatible with Smart Helmet light system
physical.Frame: Aluminum 6061 frame, hydroformed with smooth welding

technical.Range: Up to 60 miles per battery (120 miles)
technical.Riding Modes: 5 modes: Cruise, Breeze, Explore, Sport, Boost
technical.Waterproof Rating: Marker ebike is rated to IPX6. Monarc battery is rated to IPX7.
technical.Motor: Bafang B750 rear hub motor. 1638W peak motor power, 750W nominal
technical.Battery: (2) Lithium-ion 48V, 15Ah (720Wh) batteries with LG cells, semi-integrated and removable in one easy motion
technical.Charger: 48V, 5A Fast Charger. Equipped with smart charging functionality that allows riders to preset a maximum charge percentage, automatically stopping charging once reached to help extend battery lifespan. (Tip: By limiting your charge to 80% during charge cycles, you can triple your battery lifespan)
technical.Display Features: Monarc app connectivity/ Bluetooth connectivity/ USB charging/ Display Lock (via app)/ Over-the-air updates/ Smart accessory connectivity (Smart Helmet, Radar, TPMS, Camera, Heart Rate, Phone)/ Full ride customization/ Customizable color themeSept '26: Turn-by-turn navigation connection (via bluetooth)
